name: Buffalo Chicken Wings#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tips from chicken wings and cut them in half at the joint.
2. Fry the wings in 1/4 cup of butter until golden brown.
3. Allow the wings to cool completely before frying a second time.
4. Mix Tabasco and Hot Pepper sauce with melted butter.
5. Heat the wings again in hot butter until heated through, using enough Tabasco and Hot Pepper sauce to give the butter a reddish color.
6. Serve with chilled celery sticks and blue cheese dressing.
